Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x406A "SUPERBONKEYKONG-0400-406A" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Super Bonkey Kong (Pond Software - 2018).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $0400 which sets $DD00 to $94 to allow the game to run correctly.
